notableEvents.label: Rhys Hoskins plunked
notableEvents.detail: Rhys Hoskins hit by pitch. David Fry to 3rd. Brayan Rocchio to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Daniel Schneemann pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Daniel Schneemann singles on a line drive to right fielder Braden Montgomery. Steven Kwan to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Kahlil Watson pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Kahlil Watson singles on a ground ball to right fielder Braden Montgomery. Steven Kwan scores. Daniel Schneemann scores. Travis Bazzana to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Daniel Schneemann pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Daniel Schneemann pops out to third baseman Colson Montgomery in foul territory.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Travis Bazzana steals (12) 2nd base. Travis Bazzana to 3rd. Wild pitch by pitcher Seranthony Domínguez. Travis Bazzana to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Walk-off loss
notableEvents.detail: Guardians challenged (tag play), call on the field was upheld: Sam Antonacci singles on a line drive to center fielder Daniel Schneemann. Braden Montgomery scores. Tristan Peters scores.

notableEvents.label: Randal Grichuk pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Randal Grichuk homers (8) on a fly ball to left field.
